content: The working directory has buggy.py with a function `dedupe`, and its unit tests in test_buggy.py are currently failing. Use the available tools to (1) read the code and the tests, (2) fix buggy.py so every test passes, and (3) run `python3 -m unittest test_buggy` to confirm. Reply DONE once all tests pass. Do not edit test_buggy.py.

function.name: write_file

content:
All 4 tests pass. The bug was that `set()` doesn't preserve insertion order. I fixed it by iterating through the items and tracking seen elements in a set while building a result list to maintain first-seen order.

DONE
